creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sun Apr 13 01:42:21 2014
New Revision: 351170
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351170
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351170/

Log:
  - Update to 0.9.17
  - Removed dependency on open3_backport (new version doesnt need it anymore)
  - Pet portlint
  
  PR:		ports/188338
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports@robakdesign.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/rubygem-librarian-puppet/Makefile
  head/sysutils/rubygem-librarian-puppet/distinfo

Modified: head/sysutils/rubygem-librarian-puppet/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/rubygem-librarian-puppet/Makefile	Sun Apr 13 01:37:27 2014	(r351169)
+++ head/sysutils/rubygem-librarian-puppet/Makefile	Sun Apr 13 01:42:21 2014	(r351170)
@@ -1,18 +1,17 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	librarian-puppet
-PORTVERSION=	0.9.14
+PORTVERSION=	0.9.17
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@robakdesign.com
-COMMENT=	A tool for management and bundling Puppet modules
+COMMENT=	Tool for management and bundling Puppet modules
 
 LICENSE=	MIT
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PKGNAMEPREFIX}json>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-json \
-		${PKGNAMEPREFIX}librarian>=0.1.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-librarian \
-		${PKGNAMEPREFIX}open3_backport>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-open3_backport
+		${PKGNAMEPREFIX}librarian>=0.1.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-librarian
 
 USE_RUBY=	yes
 USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes

Modified: head/sysutils/rubygem-librarian-puppet/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/rubygem-librarian-puppet/distinfo	Sun Apr 13 01:37:27 2014	(r351169)
+++ head/sysutils/rubygem-librarian-puppet/distinfo	Sun Apr 13 01:42:21 2014	(r351170)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rubygem/librarian-puppet-0.9.14.gem) = 7671e33de79f21c53db9cd6742af57d507439239c6d1a621944d985070a66769
-SIZE (rubygem/librarian-puppet-0.9.14.gem) = 17920
+SHA256 (rubygem/librarian-puppet-0.9.17.gem) = 2930241943f496ec307d745cbc38e8e3ecb012116ab6c49254ce6ab75e8d65ef
+SIZE (rubygem/librarian-puppet-0.9.17.gem) = 17920
